title: Dinner Candles, 4Pcs Non Drip Twisted Candle, Long 6 Hour Burn Time Spiral Candles for Candlesticks Table Dinner Halloween Wedding Christmas Appointment Birthday Party Home Decor (Royal Blue)
features: PACKAGE CONTENTS: Set of 4 elegant twisted dinner candles, perfect for creating an enchanting ambience at your dining table or special occasions
BURN TIME: Long-lasting 6-hour burn time ensures these candles will illuminate your entire evening of entertainment or celebration
DESIGN FEATURES: Unique spiral twisted design adds a decorative touch, while the non-drip feature keeps your surfaces clean and protected
VERSATILE USE: Ideal for multiple occasions including weddings, Christmas celebrations, Halloween parties, birthdays, and everyday dining decoration
DIMENSIONS: Each candle features an elegant twisted design that fits standard candlestick holders for convenient table placement
description: Transform your dining experience with these elegant VReder twisted dinner candles. Each pack contains 4 beautifully crafted spiral candle sticks that add a touch of sophistication to any occasion. These non-drip candles are designed to burn for up to 6 hours, providing lasting ambiance throughout your evening gatherings. Perfect for creating a warm, inviting atmosphere at dinner parties, weddings, Halloween celebrations, Christmas festivities, birthdays, or any special appointment. The distinctive spiral design adds visual interest to your table settings and home décor, whilst the non-drip feature ensures your tablecloths and candlesticks remain clean. These versatile candles work beautifully in traditional candlesticks and candelabras, making them an essential addition to your home entertaining collection. Whether you're planning an intimate dinner or a grand celebration, these candles will help set the perfect mood for your special moments.

specifications_table.Special features: ‎6 Hour Burn Time, Dripless, Twisted Design
